meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with this expert Claude Code setup guide. Learn to leverage Antigravity for rapid SaaS deployment and real revenue generation.
content.answer_block: To escape tutorial hell, pivot from passive consumption to active production. Configure Claude Code to handle your boilerplate, then use Antigravity to orchestrate complex architectural patterns. This setup transforms your environment into a high-velocity engine, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS features faster than competitors stuck in documentation loops.
content.intro:
The screen glows, yet your repository remains empty. You have spent weeks consuming tutorials, collecting knowledge like digital hoarding, while the market opportunity for your SaaS continues to shrink. Tutorial hell is not a lack of effort; it is a lack of execution velocity. You are trapped in the 'how' when you should be obsessed with the 'what' and 'why' of your revenue model.

Today, we stop the cycle. We are integrating Claude Code with Antigravity to turn your terminal into a relentless engineering partner. This is not about learning syntax; it is about building a scalable infrastructure that executes your product vision, ensures technical rigor, and ships features to paying customers before the competition finishes their next video series.

steps.title: Environment Isolation & Context Injection
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace where Claude Code can index your business logic without noise. This prevents hallucinations by grounding the AI in your specific SaaS architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current directory structure and suggest a modular architecture optimized for a B2B SaaS MVP. Prioritize folder separation for services, controllers, and database models.

steps.title: Defining the Revenue-First Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, force the AI to align with your business goals. This ensures every function generated serves a monetization or retention purpose.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical implementation plan for a Stripe-integrated subscription flow. Focus on security, idempotency, and error handling for failed transactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Implement stripe checkout flow using the current codebase architecture'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Edge Case Mitigation
steps.description: Shift testing left. Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your critical business logic before the UI is even finished.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the authentication service. Include negative test cases for invalid tokens and rate-limiting scenarios.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Iteration & Deployment
steps.description: Use Claude Code to bridge the gap between prototypes and production code, ensuring your deployment pipeline remains unblocked.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current API route to support high-concurrency requests. Optimize for database connection pooling and minimize latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'Optimized API latency for high-concurrency'

steps.title: Continuous Feedback Loops
steps.description: Finalize your setup by creating a loop where Claude Code reviews its own output against your technical debt backlog.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last three commits for technical debt. Suggest refactors that improve maintainability without altering existing feature parity.

pro_tips: Always provide a 'Project Manifesto' file in your root folder; Claude Code uses this to maintain consistent coding standards across sessions.
Use Claude Code's 'ignore' patterns to keep the context window focused on your business logic, excluding massive node_modules or build artifacts.
Force the AI to explain its architectural decisions before writing code to verify it understands your business logic, not just the syntax.
Treat your terminal commands like a CI/CD pipeline; if a task takes more than 10 minutes, break it into smaller, verifiable Claude Code prompts.
Use Antigravity to map out database relationships visually before allowing Claude Code to generate migrations; this prevents costly schema refactors later.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is configured, define your MVP's core value proposition, commit to a 48-hour shipping window, and use this workflow to build your first paid feature.
content.conversion_block: Stop watching tutorials and start building the future of your business. Our community is filled with founders who have successfully escaped tutorial hell by shipping daily. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
